direction: reuse freshly computed KLAS3 FLR0 locally
rationale: CalculateKlas3 stores FLR(0) and immediately reads the same macro-backed sides.FLUX0[idx] value to form FLR(1) in both boundary branches. Keeping the just-computed flux0 in a local register removes those redundant read-backs while preserving the same flux expressions and operand order.
